calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Chris Wrabel, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. No appearance by any other party. Notice having been given and there being no objection by appearing counsel nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed with prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
